description: A taxpayer is supporting their elderly parent who lives with them and wants to claim them as a dependent.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the parent meets the criteria to be a qualifying relative.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the parent meets the gross income and support tests.

nodes.task_description: Add the parent as a dependent on the tax return.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly enters the parent's information.

nodes.task_description: Claim the non-refundable Credit for Other Dependents.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly applies the credit to the taxpayer's return.
